channel.title: World
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from World, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Chelsea flower show seeks new charity sponsors after mystery donors end support
item.description: Exclusive: Project Giving Back, set up in 2022 to help charities exhibit show gardens, says this year will be its last Chelsea flower show is looking ...

item.title: Survivor of financial abuse invited to advise ministers after Guardian report
item.description: City minister Lucy Rigby acts after woman faced repossession of house burned down by controlling husband A woman who was nearly killed by her abusive ...

item.title: Iran prepares nuclear counterproposal as US considers limited military strikes
item.description: Trump orders massive buildup of naval forces in Middle East, leading to fears of an imminent war Iranâs foreign minister has said he expects to have a...

item.title: Bishop of Lincoln arrested on suspicion of sexual assault
item.description: Church suspends Stephen Conway as police investigate claim man was sexually assaulted between 2018 and 2025 The bishop of Lincoln has been arrested on...

item.title: The supreme courtâs tariffs ruling puts Trump on notice with a bloody nose
item.description: The conservative-heavy court had largely given Trump everything he desired â until now, when two of his three nominees turned his back on him After an...

item.title: 'It's ruined my life': Hundreds tell BBC how medication triggered gambling and other addictions
item.description: More than 250 people contacted us describing impulsive behaviour side effects from prescription drugs.

item.title: Government considers removing Andrew from royal line of succession
item.description: The former Duke of York is eighth in line to the throne meaning he remains eligible to be King.

item.title: Avalanches kill five in Austrian Alps, officials say
item.description: A man skiing with his son was among the victims on Friday, bringing the region's avalanche death toll this season to at least 21.

item.title: GB go for men's curling gold and Atkin in halfpipe final - Saturday's guide
item.description: What's happening and who to look out for at the 2026 Winter Olympics in Milan-Cortina.

item.title: Two men aged 19 and 20 die after going missing on Yr Wyddfa
item.description: Mountain rescue teams were launched in challenging conditions to try and find the pair.
